name: accounting firms processing 10–50 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 payrolls/month, payroll errors cause client dissatisfaction and potential penalties. We monitor payroll anomalies instead of manual payroll checks and reconciliations.
problem_solved: frequent payroll errors leading to client dissatisfaction and potential penalties
